title: Fix package.json bin entry for tsc output paths
description: PR review flagged package.json:8. With rootDir='.', tsc emits dist/src/server.js and dist/bin/install-skill.js. The main bin entry points to ./dist/src/server.js (correct) but install-skill CLI has no bin entry, so 'npx mcp-exec install-skill' is unreachable after publish.
close_reason: Added mcp-exec-install-skill bin entry pointing to dist/bin/install-skill.js, updated plugin.json command to match

title: Fix hardcoded /bin/bash path for portability
description: PR review flagged bash.ts:13 hardcoding /bin/bash. Use 'bash' from PATH instead for portability across NixOS, FreeBSD, etc.
close_reason: Changed spawn('/bin/bash') to spawn('bash') for PATH-based resolution

title: Test: connectMcpClients with mock MCP server
description: connectMcpClients() in mcp-clients/index.ts is untested (50% coverage) because it requires live MCP server processes. Add tests using a lightweight mock stdio MCP server (a simple Node child process that speaks MCP protocol) to verify connection establishment, parallel connects, and graceful skip when a server is missing from mcp.json.

title: Integration test: MCP server JSON-RPC level
description: server.ts has 0% coverage because it's an entry point that starts a process. Need integration tests that spawn the server as a subprocess and send real JSON-RPC requests over stdio, verifying tools/list and tools/call for both 'tools' and 'exec' tools respond correctly.

title: Task 15: Full test suite + manual token benchmark
description: Run all tests (target: 37+ passing). Manual smoke test the MCP server. Document v0.1 token baseline: ~94% reduction vs direct Gmail+GDrive MCP registration.

title: Task 14: Claude Code plugin manifest
description: Create plugin.json. Registers mcp-exec MCP server, skills/SKILL.md, and install-skill command for Claude Code plugin distribution.

title: Task 13: install-skill CLI command
description: Create bin/install-skill.ts. Appends mcp-exec skill loader block to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (default) or ./CLAUDE.md (--local). Idempotent.

title: Task 12: SKILL.md agent usage guide
description: Create skills/SKILL.md. Covers: tools() discovery, import syntax, exec() patterns, session state, cross-runtime data threading, error handling, when NOT to use mcp-exec.

title: Task 11: MCP server entry point
description: Create src/server.ts. Wires everything: registers loader hooks, initializes srt, connects MCP clients, starts MCP server on stdio with tools and exec tools.

title: Task 10: MCP client connector
description: Create src/mcp-clients/index.ts. readMcpConfig() reads .claude/mcp.json. connectMcpClients() connects to named downstream servers via StdioClientTransport.

title: Task 9: Hardcoded tool catalog with search
description: Create src/catalog/index.ts. Hardcoded Gmail+GDrive ToolSummary[]. searchTools(query) with camelCase tokenizing, stop word removal, AND logic.

title: Task 8: Exec dispatcher
description: Create src/sandbox/index.ts. createExecDispatcher() parses RuntimeParam, routes to node or bash runtime, handles session lookup.

title: Task 7: Bash subprocess runtime
description: Create src/sandbox/runtimes/bash.ts. Spawns /bin/bash -c <code>. Stdout becomes result. Stateless — no session state between calls.

title: Task 6: Node.js vm runtime
description: Create src/sandbox/runtimes/node.ts. Runs user code in vm.Context via async IIFE. Captures stdout. Adjusts error line numbers by -1 for IIFE preamble offset.

title: Task 5: Session manager — vm.Context lifecycle
description: Create src/sandbox/session.ts. SessionManager creates/gets/cleans up vm.Context sessions keyed by session_id. Implicit session default. 10-min idle timeout.

title: Task 3: Sandbox config — resolveSandboxConfig()
description: Create src/sandbox/config.ts. Reads sandbox block from ~/.claude/settings.json and .claude/settings.json, merges arrays, returns SandboxRuntimeConfig. Tests with mocked homedir.

title: Task 4: Loader hooks for mcp/* virtual imports
description: Create src/loader/sources.ts (hardcoded Gmail/GDrive tool source generators) and src/loader/hooks.ts (module.register() resolve+load hooks). Tests for source generation.

title: Task 2: Shared types (ToolSummary, ToolCallRecord, ExecResult, RuntimeParam)
description: Create src/types.ts with all shared TypeScript types used across the project. Write tests in src/types.test.ts.

title: Task 1: Project scaffold (package.json, tsconfig, vitest, justfile)
description: Set up the project foundation: package.json with dependencies (@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk), tsconfig.json for Node16 ESM, vitest.config.ts, justfile, and .gitignore. DONE — committed in feat/v0.1-implementation.
close_reason: Completed: package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, justfile, .gitignore scaffolded and committed.

title: Open GH issue for sandbox environment security hardening
description: PR review flagged env security concerns that are out of scope for v0.1: bash runtime inherits full process.env, loader hooks depend on globalThis.__mcpClients fragile cross-thread pattern. Create a GitHub issue documenting current state, risks, and future plans.
close_reason: Created GitHub issue #3 documenting env security concerns, current state, and v0.2 plans

title: Resolve already-fixed PR review comments
description: Multiple PR comments already addressed in current code. Need to reply to each resolved comment on the PR to document fixes with line references.
close_reason: Replied to all 14 PR review comments with fix references or out-of-scope acknowledgments

title: Integration test: loader hooks mcp/* resolution
description: hooks.ts has 0% coverage because Node.js loader hooks run in a worker thread and can't be unit-tested. Need a loader-level integration test that runs a Node process with --import=./src/loader/hooks.ts and verifies that 'import { searchEmails } from mcp/gmail' resolves to the generated virtual module without error.

title: Test: bash runtime timeout/SIGTERM path
description: bash.ts lines 20-23 (the timeout SIGTERM path) are uncovered. Add a test that passes a short timeout to runInBash with a long-running command (e.g. 'sleep 10') and verifies exitCode=124, the process is killed, and stdout/stderr are captured up to the point of kill.

title: Test: sandbox config denyRead/denyWrite/allowRead merge paths
description: config.ts branch coverage is 47% — the denyRead, denyWrite, and allowRead merge paths (lines 57-63) are never exercised by tests. Add test cases that set these fields in user and/or project settings and verify they merge correctly without duplicates, matching the existing allowedDomains test pattern.
